reviews.review_title: Feel the pulse of the beautiful Venice
reviews.review_description:
I liked this experience: romantic city, carnival time, with 360° FPV being right in the middle of hustle and bustle with uncounted number of tourists, people in beautiful costumes and with intricately designed masks.

Taking Tragheto to cross the Canale Grande twice was for me one of the highlights of the experience. I liked the adorable Mongolian family.
You feel the photorealistic immersion especially when peeking inro the beautiful Venetian shops.

The walking experience ends at Piazza San Marco overcrowded with carnival & Venice lovers. Grand Finale!

If this is "Sam" concept, I must say: it works!
